channel.title: Home on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Home on My New Hugo Site

item.title: About Us
item.description:
About the FOSS Club

The FOSS Club at LBSCEK is a student-run organization that aims to:

  • Promote the use of Free and Open Source Software.
  • Organize workshops, hackathons, and coding events.
  • Foster a community of learners and contributors.

Our Mission

To empower students with the knowledge and skills to contribute to the open-source ecosystem.

Join Us

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Get in Touch

Have questions or want to join the FOSS Club? Reach out to us!

  • Email: fossclub@college.edu
  • Phone: +91 12345 67890
  • Address: FOSS Club, Your College, City, State, PIN

Follow us on GitHub and Twitter.

item.title: Events
item.description:
Upcoming Events

Workshop on Git and GitHub

  • Date: October 15, 2023
  • Time: 10:00 AM - 1:00 PM
  • Venue: College Auditorium

Hacktoberfest Meetup

  • Date: October 20, 2023
  • Time: 2:00 PM - 5:00 PM
  • Venue: Seminar Hall

Past Events

  • Intro to Linux: September 25, 2023
  • Open Source 101: September 10, 2023
